title: rosa gallica var. pomponia
intro: Rosa gallica var. pomponia, a variant of the French rose, is a fragrant and ornamental plant known for its double-petaled, cup-shaped flowers and strong fragrance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Rosa gallica var. pomponia is also valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing stress and improving sleep quality, due to its calming and sedative properties. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support skin health and overall well-being.
